title: LIVIVO Galvanised Steel 24L Drinks Ice Cool Bucket with Handles - Great for Parties, BBQs and Bars Cooling Bottles, Cans of Beer or Soft Drinks
features: Livivo galvanised drinks bucket - no party is complete without a good drink, and no good drink should be ever be served warm! the livivo 24l galvanised steel oval shaped beverage ice bucket is a large capacity drinks pail, great for keeping bottles, juice boxes, cartons and cans ice cool and thirst quenching
Large 24l capacity - holds a large number of bottles, cans, cartons and boxes, fill with ice to keep your drinks or fresh snacks cool
Material - constructed of galvanised steel, suitable for indoor use as a presentation piece at a party, stocked with cold drinks, and outdoor use at your next bbq, picnic or family gathering
Large steel handles - the bucket will become heavy when filled, so we've attached large steel handles for to the sides for easy and safe carrying and transportation
Dimensions - at rim - l43cm x w32cm x d27cm or l17” x w12.5” x d11”
